signals.text: Account flagged as churn risk per Granola notes: early churn request received despite October renewal. Brand never found a winning funnel despite multiple testing attempts.

Slack channel #fermat-x-veracitywellness completely silent since Feb 24 when Pulkit joined. No intro message posted by Pulkit. Last brand message (Feb 18) asking for SKU/variant list remains unanswered.
Zero Google Calendar events found for Veracity from Mar 9 through Jun 7 2026. No calls scheduled. Pulkit has never spoken with the Veracity team.
No direct email communication found between Pulkit and Veracity team in last 30 days. Gmail only shows Meta ad approvals and Glyphic prep emails for other brands. No GM intro email sent.

Granola notes indicate Grace (main contact) was terminated by Mar 11. Andres took over but meetings were being cancelled. Early termination email was sent. Situation described as cost-cutting, not performance-related.
Payment and billing concerns flagged in Granola notes (Feb-Mar 2026). Mia was checking with finance team on billing update. October renewal cycle with auto-renewal and 1-month notice requirement.

Brand was actively requesting SKU cleanup, design changes (white backgrounds), protein launch funnels, and rebrand assets in Jan 2026 under Mia - all requests likely stale/unaddressed since GM transition.
Pierre weekly roundups stopped after Jan 11 2026. Last roundup showed Jan 5-11: Sessions 9,032, Purchases 101, GMV $14,633 - strong numbers that have since declined significantly.
Platform still generating revenue: 7d shows 2,403 sessions, 43 purchases, $3,447 revenue, 1.79% CVR. Funnels can still convert when traffic flows.
Works with DTCo agency (Yuliia Rusianovska, Adaeze, James) who were actively building funnels and managing ads. Agency relationship could be leveraged for re-engagement.

calls.analysis: Last call was Feb 26 but was cancelled after only 7 minutes. Pulkit has never been on a call with Veracity. Key contacts: Jacqueline Lin, Sabrina Pereira, Maggie Sullivan (Veracity), and Yuliia Rusianovska, Adaeze, James (DT Co/Daniel Toft agency). Previously managed by Mia - weekly meetings were happening but brand was already asking to push them out. Glyphic MCP returned server errors during Apr 6 refresh; call data retained from previous pull.

calendar._note: Google Calendar confirmed zero events matching 'Veracity' between Mar 9 and Jun 7, 2026 on Pulkit's calendar (pulkit@fermatcommerce.com). Verified Apr 6 2026.

slack.analysis: Channel #fermat-x-veracitywellness (C07UG9JPS3A) has been COMPLETELY SILENT since Feb 24 when Pulkit joined. No intro message was ever posted by Pulkit. The last brand message (Feb 18) asked for SKU/variant list for promo cleanup -- this remains unanswered 47+ days later. Before the silence, the channel was very active under Mia's management (Dec 2025 - Jan 2026): weekly calls, rebrand discussions, protein launch planning, GWP tests, funnel examples. Key brand contacts: Jacqueline Lin (U098ZHHFM47), Maggie Sullivan (U096CB8DTMM). Agency: Yuliia Rusianovska (U03TBN8EA86, DT Co/EST). Pierre weekly roundups stopped after Jan 11 -- last showed strong numbers (9,032 sessions, 101 purchases). Brand was asking to push meetings out as early as Jan 29. Integration upgrades (Meta, GA4, Shopify) were requested by Jan 15 -- completion status unknown.

email.analysis: No direct brand-specific email communication found between Pulkit and Veracity Selfcare team in the last 30 days. Gmail search returned only Meta ad approval notifications (6 total between Mar 10 - Apr 1 2026) and Glyphic prep emails for other brands. No GM intro email has been sent to Veracity contacts (Jacqueline Lin, Maggie Sullivan, Sabrina Pereira). The Meta ad approvals confirm ads are still running through Veracity's account, which explains the ongoing sessions/revenue in FERMAT funnels.

insights.churn_risk: Account flagged as churn risk in Feb 2026 Granola notes. Early churn request received despite October renewal. Brand never found a winning funnel despite multiple testing attempts.
insights.billing_issues: Payment concerns flagged in Feb-Mar 2026. Mia was checking with finance team. Veracity identified as having October renewal with similar payment concerns to other troubled accounts.
insights.account_transition: Classified as one of two GM accounts showing churn risk. Early termination email sent day before handoff call. Grace (main contact) terminated by Mar 11. Andres took over but meetings cancelled.
insights.root_cause: Situation described as likely cost-cutting measure at client company, not performance-related. Agency (DTCo with Julia/Yuliia as POC) added complexity to account management.
insights.contract: October renewal cycle, auto-renewal with 1-month notice requirement.
